find_cave_biome.title: Discover an Alex's Caves underground biome (Primordial Caves, Toxic Caves, Magnetic Caves, etc.)

cave_material.title: Collect unique materials from an Alex's Caves biome (crystals, toxic blocks, etc.)

subtitle.text: Six cave biomes. Each one a different kind of wrong.

description: Alex's Caves adds 6 underground biome types.
Each one is unique in aesthetic, mob set, and resource profile.
Primordial Caves: ancient life. Living rock.
Toxic Caves: Chemical vents. Poisonous atmosphere.
Magnetic Caves: Gravitational anomalies. Crystal formations.
Abyssal Chasm: The deepest point. Dark and dimensional.
Mushroom Caverns: Bioluminescent fungi. Strange mobs.
Forsaken Hollow: Skeletal remains. Something ancient died here.
Each biome has unique mobs. Entity IDs start with `alexscaves:`.
The Nucleeper (alexscaves:nucleeper) appears in toxic variants.
Its eye ingredient is tied to the Cryptic civilization — Ch13.
